Memphis' Best
Our Story

Built on
Craft &
Culture

At Chopped N' Locked, we don't just cut hair — we shape identity. Every client who sits in our chair walks out looking and feeling like the best version of themselves.

Located on Stage Rd in Memphis, we blend old-school barbershop tradition with modern technique, delivering cuts that are clean, precise, and tailored to you. From fresh fades to loc retwists — we do it all.

Call us: (731) 377-8262
